toolPurpose: Search public events on Eventbrite by keyword, location, and date range. Returns matching events with basic details including event ID, name, description, date, time, and venue information.

location_address.description: Location address or city for event search (e.g., 'San Francisco, CA', 'New York')

start_date_range_start.description: Start date for event range search in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-03-05T00:00:00Z')

start_date_range_end.description: End date for event range search in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-04-05T23:59:59Z')

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed information about a specific event by event ID. Returns event name, description, status, dates, times, venue details, ticket classes, pricing, and organizer information.

event_id.description: Eventbrite event ID to retrieve details for

expand.description: Additional data to expand in response (e.g., 'tickets', 'organizer')

toolPurpose: List all events created or managed by the authenticated user. Returns user's events with status, creation date, and basic event information. Requires authentication with user's Eventbrite account.
Retrieve list of attendees for a specific event. Returns attendee names, emails, ticket information, and check-in status. Requires event ownership or organizer authorization.

event_id.description: Eventbrite event ID to retrieve attendees for

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed venue information by venue ID. Returns venue name, address, capacity, coordinates, and contact details.

venue_id.description: Eventbrite venue ID to retrieve details for
